name: GitHub v3 REST API
description: GitHub v3 REST API provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: meta
capabilities.description: Manage meta — github api root, get github meta information, get octocat. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: security_advisories
capabilities.description: Manage security advisories — create a repository security advisory, privately report a security vulnerability, request a cve for a repository security advisory. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: apps
capabilities.description: Manage apps — create a github app from a manifest, redeliver a delivery for an app webhook, create an installation access token for an app. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: classroom
capabilities.description: Manage classroom — list classrooms, get an assignment, list accepted assignments for an assignment. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: codes_of_conduct
capabilities.description: Manage codes of conduct — get all codes of conduct, get a code of conduct. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: credentials
capabilities.description: Manage credentials — revoke a list of credentials. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: emojis
capabilities.description: Manage emojis — get emojis. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: actions
capabilities.description: Manage actions — create a github-hosted runner for an organization, create a self-hosted runner group for an organization, create configuration for a just-in-time runner for an organization. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: code_security
capabilities.description: Manage code security — create a code security configuration for an enterprise, create a code security configuration, attach an enterprise configuration to repositories. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: dependabot
capabilities.description: Manage dependabot — set the default repository access level for dependabot, create or update an organization secret, set selected repositories for an organization secret. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: enterprise_teams
capabilities.description: Manage enterprise teams — create an enterprise team, list enterprise teams, get an enterprise team. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: enterprise_team_memberships
capabilities.description: Manage enterprise team memberships — bulk add team members, bulk remove team members, add team member. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
